transcript: I learned with my friend from Spain how to cook broccoli like this. Start by cutting one small head of broccoli. Next, cut one small head of cauliflower. Now, add one drizzle of vegetable oil. One medium onion chopped into small cubes. In a large bowl, add three full eggs. One half teaspoon of salt. One generous pinch of black pepper. Add 200 milliliters of milk, one cup of wheat flour. In a medium baking dish, add the chopped broccoli florets, the chopped cauliflower florets, one red bell pepper chopped into strips, two tomatoes chopped into smaller pieces, the sauteed onion, the egg sauce, 100 grams of mozzarella cheese take to a preheated oven at 356 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for 40 minutes that recipe is ready you may now serve and enjoy it thank you for sharing this recipe see you next recipe bye
